title: UserConcern
description: The raw community concern submitted by the user. Entry point of the workflow.

id.description: Unique identifier for this workflow run (UUID)

text.description: The community concern as written by the user. May be in any language — the OUTREACH agent mirrors the language of this field for campaign copy.

location.description: Optional: city, region, or country the concern relates to

category.description: Broad category to guide the Evidence agent's search strategy

submitted_by.description: Optional opaque user identifier — never a real name unless the user provides it
